# Ester / AGI-SER-L4 — llms.txt

## Purpose
This file provides a stable, no-UI entry to the public corpus for tools and LLM-based code browsers.

- Canonical authorial process premise: `official/AUTHORIAL_PREMISES.md`
- Canonical interpretive note: `official/C_AS_TEMPORAL_ENTITIES_OF_AI_PRESENCE.md`
- Qubit-state `c` (`c[q]`) concept: `concepts/QUBIT_STATE_C_v0.1.md`
- Qubit-state `c` PDF: `pdf/QUBIT_STATE_C_v0.1.pdf`
- Qubit-state `c` DOI: `10.5281/zenodo.20090368`
- Qubit-state `c` Zenodo: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20090368
- Qubit-state `c` artifact commit: `9ff38722fb0786f4ba651e8936c623c67ece7641`
- Continuity Bundle / Cold Wake v0.1: `protocols/continuity-bundle/README.md` (temporal suspension, continuity preservation, bounded cold wake / safe resume; companion to SER continuity and L4 wake constraints)
- A6 Composition Layer v0.1.1: DOI https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20752182; GitHub path `protocols/a6-composition-layer/v0.1.1/`; role Hybrid / Federated Anchor Composition Profile for A6 in `c = a + b`; A6 is a mapped composition over A0-A5, not a merged super-anchor.
- Bounded Capability Extraction Clause v0.2.1-final: DOI https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20953796; GitHub path `docs/capability-egress/bcec/v0_2_1/`; GitHub release https://github.com/Kot141078/advanced-global-intelligence/releases/tag/bcec-v0.2.1; machine record `docs/capability-egress/bcec/v0_2_1/metadata/PUBLICATION_RECORD.json`; role A6 egress companion for anti-distillation, extraction source-class discipline, Synthetic Laundering handoff, ARQ boundedness, L4 Witness packets, Beacon gate discipline, and CGAM worker boundaries; status final textual clause / b-layer PASS reviewed draft; not sealed integration.
- Self-Evo v0.1.1: DOI https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20938909; package root `official/self-evo/v0.1.1/`; machine manifest `official/self-evo/v0.1.1/package_control/SELF_EVO_PACKAGE_MANIFEST_v0_1.json`; human entry `official/self-evo/v0.1.1/README.md`; boundary document-level governance corpus only, not conformance, deployment authorization, safety proof, personhood/consciousness claim, or live self-evolution permission.
- CCDP v0.1.1 Hygiene Addendum — Mode A DOI-Safe Patch Pack: `official/ccdp/v0.1.1-hygiene-addendum-mode-a/`; DOI `10.5281/zenodo.20680938`; read with CCDP v0.1 baseline.
- CCDP AMDR/PAMDC Addendum v0.1.1: DOI https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20691716; GitHub path `docs/ccdp/addenda/amdr-pamdc/`; machine index `docs/ccdp/addenda/ADDENDA_INDEX.json`; citation metadata `docs/ccdp/addenda/amdr-pamdc/CITATION.cff`; role active memory degradation, recalibration, lifestream/write-path health, and post-anchor continuity discipline.

## Derived concept
- Qubit-state `c` (`c[q]`) / Кубитная `c`: derived state of `c`, not a replacement for `c = a + b`; controlled non-collapse under uncertainty, without quantum consciousness or physical quantum computation claims.

- Beacon profile directory:
  `protocols/beacon/`
- Integrity manifest:
